home.heroLogoAlt: Newon logo: outlined capital N with a white dot above
home.heroLead: Until thought becomes reality—we design simple experiences built to last.
home.heroLeadHtml:
Newon is not a company that makes apps.

We discover small problems in everyday life and turn them into experiences people keep using—a global life platform.

Habits, goals, health, finance, family records, travel journals.

We design services that make life easier and more sustainable.
home.appStoreIconAria: View Nawon Kyung apps on the App Store (opens in a new tab)
home.googlePlayIconAria: View NEWON apps on Google Play (opens in a new tab)
home.meaningP1Html: We turn new (New) ideas on (On)—the moment thought connects to reality.
home.meaningP2: We believe a single small idea can
home.meaningP3: Newon puts people’s lives ahead of technology.
home.meaningP4: What we build is not features—it is an experience that naturally blends into everyday life.
home.aboutLead: Newon is a global life platform solving everyday problems across productivity, health, finance, goals, travel journals, family records, and pet care.
home.aboutP2: We reduce complexity so anyone can use our products—turning ideas into action, action into habits, and habits into lasting change.
home.aboutP4: We keep growing so more people can experience a better everyday life.
home.brandP1Html: Newon doesn’t stop at features—we build experiences you keep using.
home.brandP2: We trim the unnecessary, focus on what matters, and put intuitive usability first.
home.workP1: Newon does not stay in one app.
home.workP2: We are building a life ecosystem that connects your day.
home.workP3Outro: We create experiences for a better life.
home.workP4: Each service works on its own—and creates greater value when used together.
home.workP4Html:
Each service works on its own

and creates greater value
when used together.
home.workP5: We are not a team that ships apps—we design sustainable change for people.
home.productsLeadHtml:
Newon is not one app—it is a family of services that support everyday life by area.

Each app works on its own, and creates greater value when used together.
home.productLi0Html: Habits · Goals · GrowthOX MONTH · GoalUp · CountUp

home.productsExtraHtml:
Today, Newon includes

OX MONTH · GoalUp · CountUp · Savy · SubPing · PiggyUp · Pillmate · BabyLog · PetLog · My World

and Newon+ connects every service.
home.visionP1: We want to build apps people love for years
home.visionP2: Our goal is services people open once a day—and keep using for years.
home.visionP3: Newon believes in the moment a small idea changes someone’s life.
home.visionP4Html: Starting from 11 apps, we are growing into a global life platform where dozens of services connect.
home.whyCard0Html: Built to lastNot trendy features—habits, travel, and family records people open every day.
home.whyCard1Html: Global reach177 countries · 13 languagesincluding travel journals worldwide.

ox.badge: 🚀 Habit tracking · Monthly logs · O/X check
ox.globalReachSummary: Build habits with a simple O/X check—track your month with logs and stats in one habit app.
ox.globalReachDescription: OX MONTH is designed for anyone who wants lightweight, honest daily check-ins. It supports 13 languages—including Korean, English, Japanese, Spanish, Portuguese (Brazil), French, German, Hindi, Indonesian, and more—and is available in 173 countries.
ox.subtitle: Log each day with O/X and see your month of change.
ox.storeReleaseLine: Available on the App Store & Google Play
ox.appStoreBadgeAria: OX MONTH on the App Store (opens in a new tab)
ox.googlePlayBadgeAria: OX MONTH on Google Play (opens in a new tab)
ox.introP1: an app to check daily follow-through simply—without heavy logging—and manage habits and goals for the month.
ox.introClosingHtml:
Small logs add up
into visible change.

ox.imgSocialAlt: Promo: Build Consistency That Lasts, five-star rating, and short testimonials

OX MONTH makes habits
easier to keep.

Today's check
Changes tomorrow's life

deleteAccount.metaDescription: How to delete your OX MONTH account in the app and what happens to your data.
deleteAccount.title: OX MONTH account deletion
deleteAccount.bodyHtml:
You can delete your account directly in the app.

How to delete your account

  1. Open the app
  2. Go to Settings
  3. Select Account
  4. Tap Delete account

When you delete

  • All user data is deleted immediately.
  • Deleted data cannot be recovered.

Contact

newon@newon.app

ox.review3Quote: I finally felt that habits are about systems, not willpower.
ox.review4Quote: After years of three-day resolutions, I finally built a real routine.

privacy.title: Newon Privacy Policy
privacy.metaDescription: Privacy Policy for all Newon apps, including OX MONTH, SubPing, and other Newon applications.
privacy.bodyHtml:
Scope. This Privacy Policy ("Policy") applies to all mobile applications developed and operated by Newon ("we", "us", or the "Company"), including related web content. It is a company-wide policy for Newon apps. Examples include OX MONTH, SubPing, and other Newon apps. This page is public and does not require a login.

1. About our services

Newon develops and operates mobile apps. This Policy explains how information may be processed when you use our services. Specific features and data practices may vary by app; please also read each app’s store listing and in-app notices.

2. Information we may collect

Collection may vary by app. In general, categories may include:

  • Information you provide: data you enter or save in the app (for example habit logs, subscription or spending-related inputs, or other content needed for app features).
  • App usage information: limited device or app-related information for quality improvement, error analysis, or security (for example crash/diagnostic information). Specific items depend on the app, OS settings, and third-party SDK policies.
  • Identifying information: we aim to process only what is necessary to provide the service. Apps without accounts may not collect direct identifiers such as your name or email. If you contact us, we may process contact details needed to respond.

3. How we use information

We may use information to: provide and operate the apps, improve user experience, respond to inquiries, analyze quality and security, comply with law, and handle disputes. We do not sell your personal information.

4. Advertising

Some apps may use Google AdMob or similar ad networks. Advertising-related identifiers and device/app information may be processed to deliver ads. You can often adjust ad personalization in device or app settings. See Google’s policies and the Third-party services section below.

5. Data storage

Depending on the app or feature, data may be stored only on your device or may be transmitted to and stored on servers operated by us or third parties (for example sync, backup, or analysis). Check each app’s settings and store description for what applies. Locally stored data may be removed if you delete the app or reset the device.

6. Third-party services

We may use third-party services or SDKs (which may vary by app), including:

  • Google AdMob: ads and related measurement
  • Other services needed for distribution, analytics, or cloud infrastructure

Third parties may process information under their own privacy policies; we encourage you to review them.

7. Your rights

Depending on applicable law, you may have rights to access, correct, delete, restrict processing, or withdraw consent. Contact us using the details below and we will respond in line with applicable laws.

8. Children’s privacy (under 13)

Our services are not directed to children under 13. We do not knowingly collect personal information from children under 13 without appropriate parental consent. If we learn that we have collected such information, we will take steps to delete it. Parents should use device and store parental controls where available.

9. Security

We use reasonable administrative, technical, and organizational measures to protect information. No method of transmission or storage is 100% secure; please also protect your device with locks and updates.

10. Changes to this Policy

We may update this Policy from time to time. For material changes, we may provide notice through the app, store listing updates, or by updating the Last updated date on this page. Continued use after changes may constitute acceptance where permitted by law.

11. Contact

For privacy-related questions, contact:

Company: Newon
Email: newon@newon.app

terms.title: Terms of Service
terms.bodyHtml:
These Terms of Service (“Terms”) govern your use of Newon’s website and applications. By using our services, you agree to these Terms.

Use of services

You agree to use our services lawfully and not to misuse, reverse engineer, or attempt to disrupt them.

Accounts and content

Some features may require an account. You are responsible for your account activity and any content you submit where applicable.

Changes and availability

We may modify or discontinue features to improve reliability or comply with requirements. We will provide notice when reasonable.

Disclaimer

Services are provided “as is” to the extent permitted by law. We do not guarantee uninterrupted or error-free operation.

Limitation of liability

To the maximum extent permitted by applicable law, Newon is not liable for indirect or consequential damages arising from use of the services.

Contact

newon@newon.app

We may update these Terms from time to time. Continued use after changes means you accept the updated Terms.

sp.badge: 🔔 Subscriptions · Recurring bills · Payment alerts · Spending insights
sp.subtitle:
Manage subscriptions—
keep more money
sp.heroReachSummary: From Netflix to phone bills, insurance, rent, and tuition—organize every recurring charge in one place and spend smarter without missing a payment.
sp.showcaseCollageAria: SubPing app screenshots — seven screens. Scroll horizontally to view all.
sp.introHtml:
We repeat dozens of payments every month.

Yet most of us move on without knowing how much we spend, where it goes, or why we keep paying.

SubPing is built to surface hidden spending, help you understand your habits, and cut costs you don’t need.

Managing money isn’t about spending less. It’s about putting more toward the life you want.
sp.premiumTagline:
Spot hidden spending
and spend more wisely
sp.imgTimelineAlt: Payment schedule, free trials, and subscription list
sp.feat1Lead: Manage every recurring bill in one place.
sp.feat2Lead: See how much you spent this month at a glance.
sp.feat5Lead: See how much you could save by canceling.
sp.feat6Lead: Streaming, phone, living, insurance, education—see category totals quickly.
sp.feat7Lead: This month’s spend and next payment—without opening the app.
sp.how1P: Add the subscriptions and recurring bills you use.
sp.how2P: SubPing organizes monthly spend and due dates for you.
sp.how5P: Cut unnecessary costs and spend more efficiently.
sp.reco1: 📺 Have five or more subscriptions to manage
sp.reco2: 💳 Wonder why your monthly card bill is so high
sp.reco3: ✂️ Want to cancel subscriptions you forgot about
sp.reco4: 📊 Prefer data over guesswork for spending habits
sp.reco5: 💼 Starting to manage salary and fixed costs
sp.closingFoot: When spending is visible, your wallet ch
sp.closingHtml:
When spending is visible,
your wallet changes

SubPing isn't built to cut spending—
it helps you understand how money flows.

Manage recurring costs
more wisely every month.

pm.badge: 💊 Med reminders · Health logs · Family sharing · Daily routine
pm.subtitleHtml:
Make today's doses easier
and stay consistent
pm.heroReachSummary: Record and manage medications, supplements, and health routines in one place—and build steady habits with reminders and logs.
pm.heroLogoAlt: Pillmate app logo: red and white diagonal capsule icon
pm.introHtml:
Make today's doses easier and more consistent

Pillmate is a medication management app where you record and manage pills, supplements, and health routines in one place.

Set dose times and get reminders so important schedules are not missed.

From morning to bedtime, build your own pattern and keep healthy habits going.

When daily medication is logged, it becomes safer and easier to manage over time.
pm.introClosing: Pillmate is not just a reminder app—it is a partner for healthier everyday routines.
pm.showcaseCollageAria: Pillmate app screenshots — seven screens. Scroll horizontally to view all.

pm.feat3Note: so important doses are not missed

pm.how3P: Receive alerts at scheduled times so nothing slips by.
pm.how4P: After taking a dose, mark it to log today's progress.
pm.how5P: Check adherence and keep your health routine going.
pm.premHiSub:
Pillmate helps you
stay consistent with your health.
pm.closingHtml:
Steady doses
Build a healthier life

Pillmate isn't just a reminder app—
it's a platform for healthy routines.

Small daily care
creates a healthier future.

sv.subtitleHtml: See your money flow at a glance
sv.heroReachSummary: A smart finance partner that brings spending, income, and subscriptions together—and helps you understand where money goes and build better spending habits with AI.
sv.heroLogoAlt: SAVY app logo: wallet, cards, and Korean won coin
sv.introHtml:
The easiest way to understand your money flow

SAVY is a smart finance app that lets you log spending, income, and subscriptions without a heavy ledger—and see your money flow at a glance.

Record daily spending, analyze patterns, and get help cutting unnecessary expenses.

The more you log income and spending, the clearer the picture—and clearer records lead to better habits.

SAVY is not just a logging app. It is a finance partner for smarter spending and healthier money routines.
sv.introClosing: Track your money flow and build better spending habits.

bl.globalReachBadge: From pregnancy to growth · worldwide service
bl.badge: 👶 Childcare logs · Growth · Family sharing · AI analysis
bl.subtitleHtml: Turn every moment into one growth story
bl.heroReachSummary: A digital growth archive—from pregnancy through teens—that helps families build a lasting story from every record.
bl.heroLogoAlt: BabyLog app logo: glossy pastel pink 3D letter B on white
bl.showcaseCollageAria: Seven BabyLog app screenshots. Scroll horizontally to view all.
bl.imgShot1Alt: BabyLog intro — AI-powered smarter parenting; capture every moment of your child with BabyLog
bl.imgShot2Alt: BabyLog Records — manage your child and family schedules in one place; Premium AI
bl.imgShot3Alt: BabyLog Calendar — all your daily parenting records in one place, May plans and summaries
bl.imgShot4Alt: BabyLog Community — connect with parents in real time; share stories and concerns

bl.imgShot7Alt: BabyLog Premium — beyond records, detailed growth insights and AI tools
bl.introHtml:
Turn every moment into one growth story

BabyLog is an all-in-one growth platform—from pregnancy through school years and teens—to record and manage your child's daily life in one place.

From feeds and sleep to health, learning, schedules, and memories—keep every moment organized.

BabyLog is not just a log. It is an AI growth partner that builds data over time, helps you understand change, and supports better parenting.

Today's small entry becomes tomorrow's precious memory.
bl.introClosing: Log each day and build a lifetime growth story.
bl.feat2Lead: Growth stage, health info, school details,
bl.feat4Note: school events, and family plans in one place.
bl.feat7Note: ask questions, and tell growth stories.
bl.feat8Lead: Growth, sleep, and routine pattern analysis—

Turn every moment into one life story

PetLog is an all-in-one pet life platform—from daily routines and health to growth and memories—in one place.

Meals and walks, weight and health logs, vaccines and clinic schedules, photos and memories—keep every moment organized.

PetLog is not just a log. It is an AI life partner that builds data over time, helps you understand health changes, and supports better pet care.

Today's small entry shapes your pet's healthier tomorrow.

pu.badge: 💰 Saving habits · Spending analysis · AI savings coach
pu.subtitleHtml: Small savings add up to bigger change
pu.heroReachSummary: From spending logs to savings goals and AI insights—record daily spending lightly, spot money leaks, and build saving habits.
pu.heroLogoAlt: PiggyUp app logo: cute pink piggy bank
pu.introHtml:
PiggyUp is

a smart savings-habit app that lets you log today's spending and keep savings goals going—without a heavy ledger.

Instead of making money care harder, we turn small daily entries into a path toward saving.

Log spending to see where money goes. Set savings goals so small steps stack into bigger change.

Start lighter money routines with a friendly pig character by your side.
pu.introClosing: Small savings build better spending habits.
pu.showcaseCollageAria: Seven PiggyUp app screenshots. Scroll horizontally to view all.

nt.heroReachSummary: A transcription platform to capture and organize sentences and thoughts from your reading. Go beyond saving lines—revisit them, reflect, and apply them to life. Transcription logs, reading notes, books, and tags—all in one place.
nt.webCtaAria: Start Noting on the web (opens in a new tab)
nt.introHtml:
Noting is not a simple memo app.

It is a transcription-first reading platform to record and manage book quotes alongside your own thoughts.

Designed for reading you remember and grow from—not reading you finish and forget.

Save good lines, write your thoughts, and revisit them over time to build your personal knowledge archive.

One small sentence can change your life.
nt.introClosing: Good sentences last longer when they are written down.
